field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '采购订单', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'can_review', 'priority', 'name', 'partner_id', 'partner_ref', 'user_id', 'company_id', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '项目与来源', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'plan_id', 'source_material_rfq_id', 'source_material_purchase_request_id', 'origin']}, {'title': '采购排期', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['date_order', 'date_approve', 'date_planned', 'on_time_rate', 'receipt_reminder_email', 'reminder_date_before_receipt', 'effective_date']}, {'title': '订单明细', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['order_line', 'notes']}, {'title': '金额与税务', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount_untaxed', 'amount_tax', 'amount_total', 'tax_totals', 'tax_calculation_rounding_method', 'fiscal_position_id']}, {'title': '收货与账单', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['incoming_picking_count', 'receipt_status', 'invoice_count', 'invoice_status', 'payment_term_id', 'picking_type_id', 'picking_ids', 'invoice_ids']}, {'title': '贸易与交付', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['dest_address_id', 'incoterm_id', 'incoterm_location', 'default_location_dest_id_usage', 'group_id']}, {'title': '审批与协同', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['reviewer_ids', 'review_ids', 'next_review', 'reject_reason', 'need_validation', 'validated', 'rejected', 'has_comment']}, {'title': '系统追踪', 'sequence': 90, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['create_uid', 'create_date', 'write_uid', 'write_date', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'can_review', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'priority', 'sequence': 40, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 50, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 60, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'partner_ref', 'sequence': 70, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'user_id', 'sequence': 80, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 90, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 100, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 110, 'group_title': '项目与来源'}, {'name': 'plan_id', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '项目与来源'}, {'name': 'source_material_rfq_id', 'sequence': 130, 'group_title': '项目与来源'}, {'name':
